legal_notice.title: Research Priority Seal
content: This form seals your research hypothesis, methodology, or finding at the exact moment of submission.
The SHA-256 seal proves you held this position before results were known — not after.
This is not peer review. This is not publication. This is a tamper-evident timestamp.
**Identity is optional.** An anonymous sealed record still proves priority — you can identify yourself later and the seal will verify your claim.

fields.label: Your Name (Optional)
fields.description: If provided, becomes part of the permanent record. Leave blank for anonymous priority seal.

fields.label: Field / Discipline
fields.description: The academic or professional field this work belongs to.
fields.placeholder: e.g. Machine Learning, Clinical Medicine, Economics, AI Safety

fields.label: Submission Type
fields.placeholder: Hypothesis / Finding / Framework Specification / Methodology / Prediction

fields.label: Hypothesis, Finding, or Specification
fields.description: State it exactly as it stands now. Do not soften beyond what is genuinely uncertain.
fields.placeholder: State your hypothesis, finding, or specification precisely.

fields.label: Methodology or Derivation
fields.description: How did you arrive at this? What method, data, or reasoning produced it?
fields.placeholder: Describe your methodology or how this was derived.

fields.label: Falsification Condition (Optional but Recommended)
fields.description: What result would prove this hypothesis wrong? A falsifiable claim is a stronger claim.
fields.placeholder: Describe what would falsify this hypothesis or specification.

fields.label: Current Status
fields.description: Where is this work right now?

fields.label: Supporting Files (Optional)
fields.description: Upload any drafts, data previews, or supporting material.

fields.label: Supporting Links (Optional)
fields.description: Links to prior work, datasets, or related material.

fields.label: Declaration
options: I affirm this submission represents my genuine position at the time of sealing — not a result known in advance.
I understand this submission is immutable — it cannot be altered after sealing.
I understand the protocol seals existence at this moment — it does not validate scientific merit.

steps: Sealing — Sealed with a FROZEN-2.0 triple-time cryptographic stamp. Permanent.
Ledger entry — Enters the Sovereign Trace ledger with timestamp and SHA-256 hash.
Notification — You receive your ledger entry ID and SHA-256 hash.
after_submit.footer:
The protocol does not evaluate the merit of your research. It seals its existence.

Sovereign Trace Protocol | Sheldon K. Salmon | aionsystem2026@gmail.com
